plot_hooks.title: South Mountain Trespass
plot_hooks.setup: Marisol detects three unknown predators cresting South Mountain into Ahwatukee, their tracks masked with treated sand and Quietus residue.
plot_hooks.hook: She asks the PCs—preferably Gangrel hunters—to follow the trail, confirm the threat, and help seal the breach before dawn.

act_i.name: Scents on Basalt
plays: The Dust-Tongue Briefing: Marisol shares her atlas, soil samples, and offers cache access for cooperation.
Echoes in the Cholla: PCs track through South Mountain Park, confronting altered Sabbat and Setite sigils while dodging Garou attention.
The Culvert Cache: Discovery of an abandoned ADOT storm culvert stocked with blood bags, towing straps, and Casa Del Sol clues.

act_ii.name: Neighborhood Veils
plays: Casa Del Sol Recon: Investigate the assisted living facility supplying sedated elders via Tremere ghouls.
Subdivision Dead Drop: Uncover a McMansion storage hub labeled "Operation: Palm Veil" with Sabbat hardware.
When Shadows Blink: Interrogate or release a Tremere-bound Black Spiral puppet watching the neighborhood.

act_iii.name: Crossing the Valley Floor
plays: Foothills Ambush: Engage the trio—Lasombra deserter Gloria "Bitumen" Ruiz, Setite heretic Father Kaine, and mortal courier "The Mule".
The Skyline Cut: Pursue any escapees through freeway drainage tunnels wracked by flooding and shadow warfare.
Ledger of Safe Trails: Debrief at Marisol's maintenance shed, updating trail maps and distributing new boons.

failure_points: If the PCs mishandle the Tremere ghoul nurse at Casa Del Sol, she triggers a panic beacon that brings Phoenix PD body cams and lets the intruders advance unchecked.
Collateral damage during the Foothills ambush can cave in Marisol's escape tunnel, forcing the coterie onto paved roads where Setite reinforcements wait.
objectives: Track the trespassers from South Mountain into Ahwatukee without triggering mortal alarms.
Identify the coalition between Lasombra antitribu, Setite heretics, and Sabbat raiders.
Secure or destroy caches before they become permanent Sabbat corridors.
resources: Access to Marisol's safe-trail caches (blood bags, silver bolos, incendiary charges).
Intel on Garou patrol windows and ADOT maintenance schedules.
Potential Brujah and Toreador support from Valley Watch allies.
complications: Garou scouts may test the PCs' right to be on the land.
Tremere wrath if their ghoul assets disappear without explanation.
Sabbat counter-hunters aiming to turn the pursuit into an ambush.
potential_outcomes: PCs co-own Ahwatukee safe trails with Marisol, gaining future travel advantages.
Captured foes expose a larger Sabbat incursion routed through Guadalupe.
Tremere politicking forces the PCs to trade intel for clemency, straining Marisol's trust.

meta_hooks.title: Coyote Sigils
meta_hooks.description: Every success or failure updates Marisol's sigil network; players can earn ongoing downtime actions to control desert routes.

meta_hooks.title: Fuel for Favors
meta_hooks.description: Marisol offers caches or mortal trucking contacts in exchange for future protection runs, binding PCs into Valley Watch logistics.

usage_notes.scaling: Easily adjusts from an investigation crawl to a full combat arc by increasing the number of Sabbat strike teams or involving Garou complications.
usage_notes.combination: Pair with Layla al-Sahr's "Quietus Residue" hook—the same Setite network could be forging both incursions.
usage_notes.character_growth: Failure risks Marisol withdrawing her atlas support; success cements the PCs as the Valley's border wardens.
